---
title: "Untitled"
format: 
    html:
        number-sections: true
execute: 
  echo: false 
  warning: true
  message: true
---

# first quarto on git
## This is my firstbranch.
### echo false hide the code
### exception can go into the individual code chunk. it will override global options
### like if the global option is excho false, but in the chunk is true, it will shoe code for that chunk.

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
```

```{r}
data("mtcars")
```
```{r}
#| lable: tbl-summarytable
#| tbl-cap: Summary of dataset
kable(head(mtcars))
```


```{r}
data <- c(3, 4, 5, 10) 
data_2 <- c(1, 4, 7, 9) 
data + data_2
```

resolved!!

```{r}
a <- c(1, 2, 3)
```

now we are trying to rebase!!
Today is Friday!!
Penguin is cute!
